description: Original tasks before rewriting based on actual data

tasks.name: Book a 45-minute kids magic show in Chicago on a Saturday next month under $250
tasks.description: Find a kids birthday magic show in Chicago on any Saturday next month, filter for shows rated 4.5+ stars with a total price of $250 or less, and start a 45-minute booking for 15 children in the afternoon.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Kids Parties" category in the main navigation menu.
In the location field on the kids parties page, type "Chicago, IL" and select the first autocomplete suggestion.
Open the date picker, navigate to next month, and select any Saturday in that month as the event date.
Open the "Price" filter, set the maximum budget to "$250", and apply the filter.
Open the "Rating" filter, check the option for "4.5 stars & up", and apply the filter.
Use the sort dropdown above the results to select "Total Price: Low to High" as the sorting option.
Click on the first show card in the sorted results list to open its details page.
On the show details page, select the "45-minute package", enter the number of children as "15", choose the earliest available start time between 2:00 PM and 5:00 PM, and click the "Book Now" button.

On the booking form, fill in the contact name as "Alex Johnson", phone number as "555-123-4567", email as "alex@example.com", party address as "123 Main St, Chicago, IL 60601", and then click the "Continue to Payment" button.

tasks.name: Add the best-value 2-hour corporate magic show under $800 to favorites
tasks.description: Search for magicians for a 2-hour corporate event in Seattle on the 3rd Thursday of next month, filter for stage + strolling shows, compare the top two by rating and price, and add the one that offers a 2-hour package under $800 with rating ≥4.0 stars to the favorites list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Corporate Events" category in the main navigation.
In the location field, type "Seattle, WA" and select the first autocomplete suggestion.
Open the date picker, move to next month, and select the 3rd Thursday of that month as the event date.
Use the duration filter or dropdown to select "2 hours" for the event length.
In the "Performance Type" filter, select both "Stage Show" and "Strolling / Close-up" options.
Use the sort dropdown above the search results to choose "Rating: High to Low" as the sorting option.
In the results list, check the "Compare" checkbox for the first performer and the second performer, then click the "Compare" button or link to open the comparison view.

In the comparison view, identify which of the two performers offers a 2-hour corporate package priced under $800 and has a rating of at least 4.0 stars, then click that performer’s "View Details" button.
On the selected performer’s details page, click the "Add to Favorites" or heart icon to save this magician to your favorites list.

tasks.name: Create a custom kids magic package with add-ons while keeping the total at or under $400
tasks.description: Use the package builder to create a custom kids birthday show in Austin with a base 45-minute show for 20 kids, add balloon twisting and a magic workshop, and adjust add-ons so that the total package price does not exceed $400 before requesting the package.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Build Your Own Show" option in the main navigation menu.
On the package builder page, select the event type "Kids Birthday (ages 7–10)" from the event type dropdown.
Enter "Austin, TX" in the location field and use the date picker to choose the first Sunday of next month as the event date.
In the "Base Show" section, click to select the "Standard 45-minute magic show" as the base package.
In the "Add-ons" area, check the boxes for both "Balloon Twisting (30 minutes)" and "Magic Workshop (30 minutes)".
In the "Guests" or "Number of Children" field, enter "20" as the number of attending children.
Look at the total price summary shown in the builder; if the total is more than $400, remove the "Magic Workshop (30 minutes)" add-on by unchecking it, otherwise leave both add-ons selected.
Click the "Save Package" or "Continue" button to proceed to the package review page.
On the review page, enter the package name "Sophia's 9th Birthday Package" in the custom package name field and click the "Request This Package" button.

tasks.name: Add a $150 email-delivered magic show gift card to the cart
tasks.description: Purchase a digital gift card for $150 to be delivered via email 2 weeks from today by filling in recipient and sender details and adding the gift card to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Gift Cards" link in the header navigation.
On the gift card page, select the preset amount option labeled "$150".
Choose "Email" as the delivery method for the gift card.
In the recipient information section, enter "Jordan Lee" as the recipient name and "jordan@example.com" as the recipient email address.
In the personal message field, type "Happy Birthday! Enjoy a magic show on us." as the message.
Open the delivery date picker and select a date that is exactly 2 weeks from today’s date for the email delivery.
In the "Your Details" section, enter "Taylor Smith" as the sender name and "taylor@example.com" as the sender email.
Click the "Add Gift Card to Cart" button to add this gift card to the shopping cart.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page showing the added $150 email gift card.

tasks.name: Find a local adult birthday magician with their own sound system and send an availability message
tasks.description: Search for magicians within 10 miles of ZIP code 94103 for an adult birthday, filter for performers who provide their own sound system, and send a message to the cheapest result asking about availability and a short lesson.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "All Performers" option in the main navigation.
In the location or ZIP code field, enter "94103" and set the radius slider or dropdown to "within 10 miles".
Open the "Event Type" filter and select "Adult Birthday" as the event type.
Open the "Equipment" or "Setup" filter and check the option for "Performer provides sound system".
Use the sort dropdown to select "Price: Low to High" so that the most affordable options appear first.
Click on the first performer card in the sorted results list to open the performer’s profile.
On the performer profile page, click the "Contact Performer" or "Send Message" button.

In the contact form, enter "Chris Patel" as the name, "chris@example.com" as the email, select "August 20" as the event date from the date picker, type a message asking about their availability on that date and whether they can include a short card-trick lesson, and then click the "Send Message" button.

tasks.name: Request a quote for an interactive, no-animals magic show for ages 5–7
tasks.description: Browse shows for ages 5–7, filter out shows with live animals, choose an interactive 30–45 minute show, and submit a quote request for a school event with 25 children at 10:00 AM.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Browse Shows" option in the main navigation.
In the sidebar filters, open the "Age Group" filter and select the option labeled "Ages 5–7".
Open the "Show Style" or "Content" filter and choose the option that indicates "No live animals" or uncheck any option that includes live animals.
Open the "Duration" filter and select the "30–45 minutes" duration range.
Scroll down the filtered results until at least six show cards are visible, then click on the third show card in the list to open its details page.

If the show description includes the word "interactive", stay on this show’s details page; otherwise, use the browser back button and click the next show card whose summary text includes the word "interactive".
On the selected show’s details page, click the "Request a Quote" button.
In the quote request form, choose "School Show" as the event type, set the number of children to "25", select "10:00 AM" as the preferred time, and click the "Submit Request" button.

tasks.name: Start booking a 1-hour weekday afternoon close-up magic show using promo code WEEKDAY20
tasks.description: Find a 1-hour close-up corporate magic show on a weekday afternoon, apply the promo code WEEKDAY20 on the booking page, and proceed toward checkout, choosing a cheaper suggested package if it appears under $300 after discount.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Corporate Events" category in the main navigation.
In the filters, select "Monday–Thursday" under the "Day of Week" or similar weekday filter.
Open the "Time of Day" filter and choose the "Afternoon (12 PM–5 PM)" option.
In the "Performance Type" section, select "Close-up / Strolling Magic" and set the duration dropdown to "1 hour".
Use the sort dropdown to choose "Total Price: Low to High" so the most affordable 1-hour options appear first.
Click the first show card in the results to open its details page, then click the "Book Now" button to go to the booking summary page.
On the booking summary page, locate the promo code input field, type "WEEKDAY20" into it, and click the "Apply" button.

If an alternative 1-hour close-up package appears in an "Other Packages" or "Suggested" section with a total price under $300 after the promo code is applied, click that alternative package to switch to it; otherwise, continue with the original booking selection.
Click the "Proceed to Checkout" button to move to the attendee or purchaser information page for the selected discounted package.

tasks.name: Reschedule an existing kids birthday magic show booking to a Sunday within 30 days
tasks.description: Log in to an existing account, open the upcoming kids birthday magic show booking, and reschedule it to a new date that is a Sunday within 30 days of the original date while keeping the same start time.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the "Log In" link in the header.
On the login form, enter the email "pat@example.com" and the password "Magic123!", then click the "Log In" button.
After logging in, click the user avatar or name in the header and select "My Bookings" from the dropdown menu.
In the list of bookings, locate the upcoming "Kids Birthday Magic Show" that is scheduled for next month and click its "View Details" button.
On the booking details page, click the "Reschedule" or "Change Date" button.

In the reschedule calendar, select a new date that falls on a Sunday and is no more than 30 days after the original event date, then keep the same start time by leaving the time selector unchanged or re-selecting the original start time.
Click the "Save New Date" or "Confirm Changes" button to apply the reschedule.
On the updated booking summary page, click the "View Updated Details" or "Download New Itinerary" button.
